subject: Read configuration and start-up A1 policy management service
commit_message:
Read configuration and start-up A1 policy management service

This is the first commit for A1 policy management service.
The placeholder code will be added in upcoming commits.

Change-Id: I2e2d4d8e73d38f9167d19220139e639df97d48d9
Issue-ID: CCSDK-2617
Signed-off-by: RehanRaza <muhammad.rehan.raza@est.tech>

Tests are available but not in this commit. We tried to minimise the size of the commit to hopefully make the initial review a bit easier. 

If you prefer we can abandon this change and upstream the entire seed code contribution in one massive commit - then all tests etc would be included - but very difficult to review. 

Please let us know which is better for you. :-)

> 
> Copyright header for most of files has 2019 in it, please have it changed to 2020 !
We are moving this code from ORAN-SC where these files were created in 2019 under the same license. So, we think it would be good to keep the same year in license when moving here.

Patch Set 5: Code-Review-2

> 
> Please commit tests in another review, but keep that other review in chain with this one !!

I'm okay with the unit tests being submitted in a separate commit.  However, we cannot approve this merge until those tests are submitted.  We are required to maintain 55% code coverage on all repos at all times - failure to do so will jeopardize our meeting the M2/M3 project milestone next week.

-2 for now - I'll revisit when I see the test cases added.

Abandoned

It will be difficult to split the seed code in several commits and maintain 55% coverage at all times. So, abandoning this commit and add the whole seed code in one big commit.
